node.text:
Two classics celebrating LA skate culture.
 
▶️: The Last One
🎥: @cleonarrey
🥤: @cocacola
🎞: @kodak_shootfilm Super 8
 
Inspired by @cocacola, captured on the new @kodak Super 8 Camera.
Just following the signs.

Can’t get more classic than a Coca-Cola with denim.

📸 @gimtakeone @yon1_yeon1

A set for the season.
 
📸 @jodiefeeneyobrien

A New York minute, made into a moment. 
📸 @alvinwayne

On the way is the best way.

📸 @haisydaisy @thatruinedphotography @x700gallery

Pizza night in? Game on. 
📸 @keltsvibe

Ring stack, complete. 
 📸 @alyxdoran

Serving looks since 1886.

 📸 @johnmichael_nyc @choi_machoi @mahimabhasin @christinacaradona

A night for the camera roll. 

 📸@blakefromohio

Weekend forecast: 

 📸 @onlyluckycan @solars_films

Shifting gears for a moment. 

 📸 @maik_n.g @djgalfly_official @ayrtoncinco @chadbrownmusic
Everybody’s got theirs.

node.text:
#cokepartner No matter the decade, some things never go out of style
Iconic in any era
Then, now, always

node.text: We partnered with @kennelly_m to do what no influencer would ever do: go to @govballnyc without the phone. Turns out, the best memories don’t need a camera roll. And yes, it still counts even if you don’t post it.

node.text: Omw to scoop the @crenshawskateclub x Coke collab

And it was a very very very very good day. 
 
📸 @navaxco @anaila_studio

For lovebirds, first dates, same-side-sitters, situationships, and still figuring it out-ers. We’re not putting a label on it. #CokeIsForEveryone

📸 @nataasha100_ @sofiotat @jazzandtheblues @roxx_lynn @1buttah @kaelabryann @kinsey.dewan @luanndiez @photosbynevaye @gabexjames

The greatest love story ever told. 

📸 @destinymbarrera @bezera2271 @dashaakozak @lasorteds

Lost the plot but made a memory.

📸 @x.tranquil @fashioncrave

node.text:
Hold the 📞, your perfect pick-me-up recipe just dropped courtesy of @logansfewd’s #CertifiedCoketails:

Line the inside of the glass with marshmallow fluff
(1) Cup of ice
(1) Coca-Cola Zero Sugar
(1) Shot of espresso

node.text:
#CertifiedCoketails but make it 🧘 thanks to @twaydabae’s matcha coke recipe:
 
(1) TBSP of cherry puree
(1) Cup of ice
(1) Coca-Cola Zero Sugar
(1/4) Cup of matcha 
(1/4) Cup of Cold Foam

Redefining the “ice-cold Coca-Cola.”
 
📸 @foxfriend @cocoorquillas

Coca-Cola aura points 10,000
 
📸 @lolapwade

Coca-Cola x Awake NY

Available in store and online. Link in bio to shop the collection.

Besties that photo booth together, stay together. @oreo please confirm.

node.text:
👋 🌎 The Song of The Olympics is here. 
Hello World with @gwenstefani and @anderson._Paak is OUT NOW! Available on streaming platforms Worldwide. Check out the music video at the link below! 

📹: cokeurl.com/HelloWorld

@thecocacolaco #Olympics #Paris2024 #CocaCola​
Coca-Cola on film 🎞️ from @isabellesaidiphoto

node.text:
A BATHING APE® and Coca-Cola® are collaborating on a new collection that will be available at A BATHING APE® authorized stores and BAPE.COM on Saturday, October 7th.
 
The collection includes a wide range of apparel and accessories, and for the first time, the original "BAPEX®" watch from BAPE®︎ will be available in the Coca-Cola colorway, featuring a red and black bezel with a striking red dial. Another special element of the collaboration is the debut of the original "SKULL STA" shoes offered in the Coca-Cola colorway with red and black BAPE CAMO on the inside and outside of the upper along with the Coca-Cola Classic logo on the heel.
 
©2023 The Coca-Cola Company. All Rights Reserved.
 
@cocacola 

#abathingape #bape #CocaCola

node.text: Sip on THAT. 🥤
It’s a statement piece and that statement is “Grab me a Coke please."

node.text: Saying goodbye to summer at a rooftop BBQ with good music, better friends, and an ice-cold Coke is @chefdarayu #recipeformagic. ✨

node.text: Lunch break outside + the ultimate summer steak sandwich + an ice cold Coke Zero = my #recipeformagic ✨One of my greatest joys, in the summer time especially, is eating outside every chance I get. So why not keep the vibes of last night’s BBQ going by using up those leftovers, linking up with your bestie and having yourselves the best lunch break ever.

node.text:
#RealMagic happens when when we connect with others through music. Tag a friend with a song that reminds you of them below. 🥰   
                             
Be sure to watch the ’Be Who You Are’ music video featuring @newjeans_official on the #CokeStudio YouTube channel. [Link in bio] 🎤 🎶

NEW MUSIC: “BE WHO YOU ARE”!! w friends from all over the world. I’VE BEEN WAITING FOR THIS DAY!!! 💜🌹🌱SHARE THIS WITH EVERYONE YOU KNOW 😭 I LOVE YOU EVEN IF I DON’T KNOW YOU SO THANKS FOR BEING SO AWESOME ⚡️⚡️⚡️THIS IS SOOO FIREEEEEE Watch it here 🔥 @catburns @jidsv @newjeans_official @camilo @CocaCola #CokeStudio #RealMagic #CokePartner 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾💎💎💎
